inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description:
Defines the accessible name of the component, which is used as the name of the card region and should be unique per card.

*Note:** `accessibleName` should be always set, unless `accessibleNameRef` is set.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Defines the IDs of the elements that label the component.

inputs.name: loading
inputs.description: Defines if a loading indicator would be displayed over the card.

inputs.name: loadingDelay
inputs.description: Defines the delay in milliseconds, after which the loading indicator will show up for this card.
